title: Assistant Store Manager - Dulux Decorator Centre - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Dulux Decorator Centre - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Dulux Decorator Centre are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dulux Decorator Centre:
Dulux Decorator Centre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre!
